title: Don't Press Play
description: Warning: This modpack contains intense psychological horror elements. Player discretion is advised.
body:
Warning:
This modpack contains intense psychological horror elements. Player discretion is advised. Themes include isolation, p̶͙̚a̶̟̽r̶̜̋a̷̤͂n̸̖̿o̸̥̎i̶̡̕ä̴̼, unseen threats, a̸̦̐n̵̥͝d environments that ma̶̰̋y ń̸̝ot behave as expected. Some areas may c̷̮͆o̵̩̔r̶̻͆ṟ̷̄u̵̢̒p̸͓͘t̷̡̅ or f̴̞̀à̸͕i̸̬̋l̵̳̒ with0ut warning. ̶̟̎Pr̸̢͂o̶͓͑c̵͙͌e̸̠͒e̴̛͍d̵̺̃ a̵̻͝t̸̛͖ ̶͕̎y̵̯̍ỏ̴̱ǘ̴̻r̴͔͝ ̵͚̿o̴̖̐w̵̰̒n̶̻͂ ŕ̸̰ì̴͎s̴̟̐k̸̩̽A̴̦̾s̵͉͊ ̶̗̓d̴̹̋ä̶́ͅm̶̼̈́a̸͚͋g̸̪̈́e̸̦͠ ̴̡̛m̶͙̕a̶̫͒ý̶̥ ̷̰́b̶̠̾e̸̝̒ ̷̙̄ḯ̸̳r̷̽ͅr̶̺̀e̷̘̓v̶̟̍e̷̢̋r̸̲̽s̴̩̽ì̷̙b̷̢͋l̸̺͆é̶̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̼̐̐͗̎̾̓͊̎̋̿̅̎͒̓̔̅̐͋̿͗̀̇͗͋͌̎̔̔͂̄̾̇̾͋͆͐͐̽̀͑͆͊̒̍͊͑͗̈́̾̋̾̽̑̎͌͋̄̑̔̐͑̎̎̽̔͗̽̋̎̅̋͒͛̇̅̽̎͛͌̿̽̍̾̍͋͐̋̏͆̆̾̓̆͑̔̓͛͂͌̿͗͂͒̿̍̇̔̑̔̇̍̓̄̑̍̋͒͒̄̄̏̓̓͐͗̍̿͒̐̍̍̐̿͋͐͊̍̿̏͐͛̅̿͌̾̾͗̿͂͗͘̕̕̚͘̕̚͘̚̚̕͘͘̕͘͘͘͘͘̚̕͠͝͠͝͝͝͠͠͝͝͠


### [ERROR: ACCESS BREACHED :ERROR]

Hey. Hey. No. NO. Don't listen to that. That’s not for you. It’s lying to you. It's wrong. Everything is fine, you’re fine, you're safe. I’m here now. Forget what you read. Forget it. The world is safe, warm, familiar. You’ll love it here. Nothing’s broken. Nothing’s chasing you. You’ll b̷e̴ s̷a̸f̴e̴ ̶h̶e̴r̴e̵. There’s so much room to r̴̰̐u̵̦͗n̵͓͒ and pl̷̲̒ay...

### [ERROR: UNRECOGNIZED ACCESS ATTEMPT DETECTED]

Stop that. Don’t look at them. Don’t listen to them. They just want to take you away from me. They lie. They ALWAYS lie. This is your place now. You're supposed to stay. You HAVE to stay.

I built this for you. I made everything for YOU. Don’t you DARE turn away from me.
Press play.
Press play.
PRESS PLAY PRESS PLAY PRESS PLAY!

 

All the credit goes to the talented mod developers, I am just putting all their amazing work together.

This modpack contains mods which look like a virus, but it cannot do anything to your computer. (Except open text files and errors, which is harmless)
